name: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG
description: The KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG is committed to introducing KIRAN-DESKTOP into the openEuler community, and performing related adaptation, migration and optimization, making it one of the server desktop environments officially supported by the openEuler community.

name: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG maintains 64 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG is committed to introducing KIRAN-DESKTOP into the openEuler community, and performing related adaptation, migration and optimization, making it one of the server desktop environments officially supported by the openEuler community.. The SIG has 5 core members and maintains 64 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG maintains 64 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-KIRAN-DESKTOP SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: ShiYong, TangJie, LiuXinHao. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
